author: hoodie_atom
prompt: In BAL-40, is a 2400mm wide window compliant if using Stegbar BAL-19 rated framing?
bad_output: Yes, 2400mm is a standard size and should be fine for BAL-40.
good_output: No. Stegbar BAL-19 window systems have a minimum width of 2410mm for compliance. A 2400mm window fails by 10mm. Specify 2410mm or greater.
